subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise befitteth and beseemeth the Pen and the Tablet, Educator of worlds innumerable, Who created all beings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از لوح و مداد مربی عوالم لاتحصی را لایق و سزا که خلق را خلق فرمود و
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
